title: Senior Cloud Engineer
description: NovaCorp is a FTSE 250 company undergoing a major cloud transformation. We need a Senior Cloud Engineer to join our Platform team and lead the migration of on-premise workloads to AWS and GCP. You'll define standards and patterns used by 500+ engineers across the organisation.
responsibilities: Lead cloud architecture for 3 major migration workstreams
Define IaC standards and golden path templates for 10 product teams
Implement security controls and compliance guardrails
